variants: Riya Banerjee is a dedicated professional in the field of Environmental Law. She is recognized for holding the Titanium Gardener Credential, a testament to her commitment to sustainability and ecological practices. Riya has benefited from the guidance of her mentor and doctoral advisor, Gabe Cormier, whose expertise has profoundly shaped her career. In addition to her legal pursuits, she is an active member of the Emerald Enchanters Forum, where she collaborates with like-minded individuals to promote environmental initiatives. Her research is primarily funded by the Sapphire Nova Collective, ensuring that her work receives the support it needs to thrive.
